headline: Elon Musk Says Orbital Computing Unlocks 'Trillion Times' More Scale As Brian Armstrong Calls Earth's 'Excessive Regulation' A Drag On Progress
summary: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) CEO Brian Armstrong said on Thursday, June 18, that it's becoming easier to build data centers in orbit around Earth than to build them on Earth.
